betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Fluid Transport§f

§aMove fluids in and out of your pipe network with precision!§f
These blocks form the connection points between your pipes and the world, machines, or tanks.

§6High Pressure Output§f (`pressure:output`):
Outputs fluids from pipes into adjacent pipes/tanks/machines. Back connects to pressure pipe (darker side, no arrows). Front outputs to other systems (brighter side with arrows). §bCan be filtered§f.

§6High Pressure Input§f (`pressure:input`):
Accepts fluids from pipes on the back (arrows pointing away). Sends fluids into the pipe network on the front (darker side with arrows, towards pipe). §bWith redstone signal§f, will actively extract from tanks and machines. Only accepts fluids if a valid output is connected. Distributes fluid evenly across multiple outputs. §bCan be filtered§f.

§6High Pressure Pump§f (`pressure:pump`):
Pumps fluids between tanks, pipes, and machines at maximum rate. Requires §bredstone signal§f to activate. §bCan be filtered§f.

§eTip§f: Always ensure an output is connected before an Input will accept fluids.
